properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Love the Lord, your God, with all your heart With all your soul, with all your mind And with all your strength Love the Lord, your God, with all your heart With all your soul, with all your mind And with all your strength

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: With all your heart, with all your soul With all your mind, with all your strength Love the Lord, your God, with all your heart With all your soul, with all your mind And with all your strength

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will serve the Lord with all my heart With all my soul, with all my mind And with all my strength I will serve the Lord with all my heart With all my soul, with all my mind And with all my strength

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will love You, sing it out (I will love You) I will praise You, lift hm up (I will praise You) I will serve You, Lord (I will serve You) I will trust You, Lord (I will trust You)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: With all my heart, with all my soul With all my mind, with all my strength With all my heart, with all my soul With all my mind, with all my strength

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I will love You, Lord, with all my heart With all my soul, with all my mind, and with all my strength I will love You, Lord, with all my heart With all my soul, with all my mind, and with all my strength I will love You, Lord, with all my heart With all my soul, with all my mind, and with all my strength
